'''Rishos''' was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] orbiting the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Rish]] in the [[Rishi system/Legends|Rishi system]]. Located in the [[Abrion sector/Legends|Abrion sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], it was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]]. Promising stores of gases were found on Rishos that stood waiting to be harvested by enterprising [[Mining/Legends|mining]] corporations.

*<!-- 1993-04-XX -->''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]''
